tools.name: default.getChildren
tools.description: Return children from a given SHA1.  A number of element to return and an offset must be given. If not set it will be the 100 first elements. A cursor must be given to paginate over. The starting cursor is 0.

tools.name: default.getParents
tools.description: Return parents from a given SHA1. A number of element to return and an offset must be given. If not set it will be the 100 first elements. A cursor must be given to paginate over. The starting cursor is 0.

tools.name: default.getSessionCreate
tools.description: Create a session key to keep search context. The session is attached to a name. After the session is created, the header `hashlookup_session` can be set to the session name.

tools.name: default.getSessionMatches
tools.description: Return set of matching and non-matching hashes from a session.

tools.name: default.getStattop
tools.description: Return the top 100 of most queried values.

tools.name: default.postBulkmd5
tools.description: Bulk search of MD5 hashes in a JSON array with the key 'hashes'.

tools.name: default.postBulksha1
tools.description: Bulk search of SHA1 hashes in a JSON array with the 'hashes'.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
